mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fun_player_card_pitcher_pitch_grades ( card_id, four_seam_grade, two_seam_grade, changeup_grade, circle_changeup_grade, slider_grade, curve_grade, forkball_grade, cutter_grade, sinker_grade, splitter_grade ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{fourSeamGrade}, #{twoSeamGrade}, #{changeupGrade}, #{circleChangeupGrade}, #{sliderGrade}, #{curveGrade}, #{forkballGrade}, #{cutterGrade}, #{sinkerGrade}, #{splitterGrade} )
mapper.update: UPDATE fun_player_card_pitcher_pitch_grades SET four_seam_grade = #{fourSeamGrade}, two_seam_grade = #{twoSeamGrade}, changeup_grade = #{changeupGrade}, circle_changeup_grade = #{circleChangeupGrade}, slider_grade = #{sliderGrade}, curve_grade = #{curveGrade}, forkball_grade = #{forkballGrade}, cutter_grade = #{cutterGrade}, sinker_grade = #{sinkerGrade}, splitter_grade = #{splitterGrade} WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
mapper.select: SELECT card_id, four_seam_grade, two_seam_grade, changeup_grade, circle_changeup_grade, slider_grade, curve_grade, forkball_grade, cutter_grade, sinker_grade, splitter_grade FROM fun_player_card_pitcher_pitch_grades WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
